text: this starbucks is convenient and like most of the other establishments delivers a similar experience i find it kind of funny that it s right next door to a dunkin donuts but maybe that s a benefit for those of us who don t want to pay for a scone made from organic power berries harvested from the heart of the jungles of expensivecoffeebeanland
drive thru is super convenient but can be slow especially during the weekday mornings seems understaffed at times but so far havent had an issue with an order

i go here all the time and there is literally never the same employees very confusing not sure if it s a training store or what sadly my cloud macchiato was completely wrong today even more sad i expected it because my orders have been messed up in the past every employee i ve come in contact with is super nice though

this is my favorite starbucks ever thanks to the barista her name starts with a c i believe who made my drink a double shot on ice perfectly and without a second thought or even an eye roll she seemed happy to be there the manager at the counter however named jeff was absolutely rude to me he acted visibly annoyed with me while taking my order and had a mocking tone to his voice i could tell he didn t want to deal with me i was polite as can be but he definitely woke up on the wrong side of the bed seems to me like the barista and manager should switch positions she is much more customer friendly than he is and served me with sweet hospitality and a warm smile she is the only reason i will return

at the drive thru was packed and slow the employee working the drive thru was slow and i had to ask for stir sticks stoppers for the drinks that was odd but not too bad what was bad you ask having to ask for my change i handed her my cash and was expecting almost an entire dollar in change she took my money and said thank you have a nice day my response after starting at her for a few seconds may i have my change confused look from her uhm yeah uhm how much was it again i don t know if you expected the change as a tip or just had a brain fart but seriously give me my change you didn t deserve a tip after making me wait as you screwed up my order took your time on my order and then neglected to give me change i ll skip a return to this location at any time of the day

oh how i love this starbucks mainly because of where it s located today was my first time to this location it s been long overdue for starbucks in the neighborhood it s very clean nice decor plenty of seats inside and out overall a nice space to enjoy the riverfront the employees were welcoming and friendly they seemed very knowledgeable of the drinks however they were very busy lines were long and the service was slow i ordered the usual grande carmel macchiato it did not taste as if it was made properly i told the barista it tasted funny and they gladly made it again this time it tasted a bit better lol although i did not have the best service today i will go back to give them a second chance if you live in the area definitely give them a try im sure they ll get better with time

when i m driving on the this is our stop to make to stretch the legs use el ba o and get a drink it s more about the strategic location than the actual location it s usually dirty on the floor the service is at a minimum and it is average on speed too bad it s not known for the better i hope they raise the bar soon this does not mean that the employees don t care who knows only they do but it does mean that it is sorely lacking when it comes to other more cheerful and clean starbucks

this starbucks gets my order correct times out of which is great but this is by far the slowest starbucks i have ever been to i ve gone to this one fairly regularly since they opened and my experience is always the same when the drive through is busy you could wait as long as minutes from ordering to actually getting to the window going inside does not make too much of a difference either this is not to say that the staff is slow they are always working and moving as fast as possible the problem is that they do not have enough staff or kitchen space to keep up with the volume of patrons my recommendation put in a mobile order before you leave your house and it might be ready by the time you get there

small location inside a rest area but with a full menu the milk and sweeteners are done by the baristas not at a station so make sure to ask for what you need service was slower than at dedicated locations but still fairly friendly not bad for a quick pick me up on the road

this is my morning go to coffee spot before the gym absolutely love james he always has great customer service however the past few times i ve been my coffee is half full i always order a grande and it feels so light i didn t take a single sip from this coffee and finally checked it this time i don t want to sound rude at the drive thru asking for it to be a full cup like i know there s space for whip but my goodness

oh man did these guys get a new staff things seem to be served so much slower than in the past i live across the street so it s super convenient and i wouldn t stop coming back but man i have to give myself like extra minutes additional now compared with the old staff

frequent here there is usually a line in the drive thru and subsequent wait today was a it long though i was the only car in line customer service was poor today as well when i did get my non specialized cold beverage the cashier did not look at me and leaned it our the window half tilted this rubbed me the wrong way service is normally better perhaps he was having a bad day inside the store it is clean and cozy the bathrooms are also very clean

spacious clean starbucks located next to st joe s baristas were friendly but a little inefficient people in line and minutes to get my drink hate to see what would happen if the line really started to back up not sure how long this store has been around but it seems pretty new strange hours as it closed at on the day that i visited let s not stay open too late now we might pull in too many college kids in need of a study break

this starbucks in horsham is staffed by friendly baristas who aim to please and you do not get too much of the upsell dont you want something to eat today schtick the drive through window is convenient but it is a pain to get in and outof the parking lot due to the traffic nothing special but nothing wrong with this location

since i came twice this week i ll write about both experiences earlier i ordered via drive thru the lines are usually long at this location today was lite in comparison even with a lite line their drive thru service can be a bit slow but that could be perspective since we expect things almost instantly in a drive thru line i ordered my iced doppio as usual and it was made perfectly with all of my little additions if you order banana nut loaf ask them to warm it up it will change your world today i ordered an iced doppio and it didn t turn out as expected so they actually have on the menu an iced doppio that comes grande and i think there are things added in it that i m not too fond of so if you want a double espresso just ask for a double espresso i ll have to remember that next time other than that my bacon gouda egg sandwich was great the only negative experience this trip was coming inside the store this time and with only people in front of me it still took while before i was able to order guess i ll have to use the app more to order from this store specifically

this is a pretty typical starbucks i don t go here very often but when i do the drinks are always made exactly how i expect them to be made the employees are always nice and chat a little bit at the window while waiting for the drink to be done or payment to go through the patio is decent no complaints on these things at all where there is a complaint however is that this location is very small and the parking lot is a terrible joke it s on a very busy section of broadway where many different commuters pass all day long it gets super busy it s not set up for super busy the drive thru line is usually jammed packed and flowing out onto broadway causing a major nightmare for busy traffic it actually is dangerous at times people will flat out stay in a traffic lane just to stay in that damned drive thru line there s very little parking so even if people weren t lazy as can be there s still a hassle there i wish they would redesign this location somehow to make the busy line flow better or at least to get it off of broadway for safety reasons

not bad not superb just starbucks i love that there s a drive thru but the location is off of the street so it s kind of hard to get here yesterday morning the lid of my frappuccino was not properly applied to the cup so it created a whole mess after i pulled off not cool baristas not cool but i ve been here several times before then and had no problem
this starbucks has probably one of the rudest barista s ever slamming the oven throwing our food down i get that it s early but if you hate your job change it three stars because the coffee is good

its an average starbucks location i think the best quality is the amount of outlets along the glass wall maybe i m spoiled but the staff at the location closer to my house is really friendly the peeps here not so much not that they are rude or anything just not friendly the wifi kicks me out about every minutes which is annoying they ve recently rearranged the seating area to allow for more space but it feels pretty cramped now they do have a large outdoor patio area which i think is awesome weather permitting

i was starving and needed coffee desperately when i stopped by this location it was a cold day outside so needless to say all the indoor seating was taken the barista was very friendly and was quick about getting my coffee started my spinach wrap was a different story it seemed to take awhile and when they said it was ready it was a breakfast sandwich apparently another customer had taken my wrap the barista apologized and started another wrap for me they served it as soon as it was ready which meant it was super hot the taste was good though not my favorite starbucks location but not bad

we will start with the good this particular starbucks is located just off of i and is open hours a day after that though it kind of heads downhill when we stopped in it was late afternoon and nobody else was in there for whatever reason it still took way too long to make a few simple drinks another reason for the low rating there is no place to really hang out here as there is with just about every starbucks no chairs or couches the place is purely built for you to go in and out and that is all overall just not the starbucks experience i am used to getting

you take time to write a review if is really good or the opposite i like this location nothing really that can be criticized other then long lines every time but i like the crowd the outside patio is great but i only give stars because every time i go they misunderstand my order now i learned to read what they write on my cup misspelling my name is fun but me repeating a few time coconut milk please is embarrassing if i see they put my drink in dairy blender i know they got wrong and i ask again some are funny and chat with you make a nice comment but yesterday both girls the one that took order and one made my drink forced me write the review this morning she took a long time to make this mocha frap with coconut milk chat with her coworker that was carrying buckets of ice making jokes between the two got distracted with so many other moves around meantime started like few other drinks literally i saw my drink waiting at every step to get to the next it was in blender for like over minutes because she served a few other drinks she even took time to rinse the blender cup and top before she got a top for my drink to serve it my drink got to me very watery because it was melting already and not much flavor i don t think i had all ingredients in it but i had to run otherwise i would have told them to remake it did not risk it for another long wait what can i say i will go there again because the nice location and very convenient to enjoy a sunny morning

not my favorite usf area starbucks but convenient on my way to work parking is often an issue and many times when i visit the baristas are cleaning or vacuuming or conducting other loud tasks not an ideal location to sit and chat though the seating is plentiful and diverse a couple big comfy chairs a high top a long bar that regulars sit at to chat with the baristas my last visits have been okay one was for a frappuccino that took far too long to make between the baristas working and no one in front of me the guys after me got their drinks before me and they were quite chummy with them meanwhile i m standing there awkwardly waiting the girl doing the register was new and took awhile to ring me up but it was fine last night i wanted a passion tea lemonade and was told they were out of lemonade i was recommended to try a passion tea apple juice and reluctantly agreed then the computer froze up for a minute and i was given it on the house bonus i ll take some free starbucks though i admit i did want the stars on my card lol this one is much less crowded than fowler and not much further from usf i also wish this was drive through or there was some drive through on my way to usf but this one is pretty good fowler is my favorite for the friendliness and speed but this one is good too

it s starbucks my default rating for fast food chains is stars and they didn t do anything special to rise above that they didn t do anything bad enough to lose a star either though i was seriously tempted to drop one for the lack of drive thru there is at least a parking lot though

starbucks is not really something a challenge in terms of food you know what you re going to get customer service however is very important i ve been coming to the egg harbor greentree starbucks for years as a regular i can say that the staff here is extremely friendly and helpful one issue you may have depends on the time of the day at some points high school lets out and this place can be as loud as a school cafeteria other times several parents decided that this starbucks is a good place to bring their children being in washington township they have the my kid does no wrong attitude and often the parents will allow their infants to cry or their younger children to run around as if this were a daycare it does affect the experience of a nice place to relax with a tasty beverage the service gets a star rating the crowd sometimes kills it though

who doesn t love starbucks at this location it s a hit or a miss they are always busy and you never know if the person at the window is gonna be nice or rude they do have the most up beat nice man working the window sometimes but there are these two ladies who are just rude like here is your coffee now leave and basically doesn t care if your order is correct or not but i still go anyway bc it s close to home

i like this starbucks as others have said it s true some of the barista s can be slightly slow moving i ve been here about x s only though so i may not be completely right about that i think i ve ordered frappacinnos only which i always thought were well made there s a parking lot that s a nice thing as street parking is metered off topic there s a ups zesto pizza in this retail fixture i ve been to the pizzeria only once but really liked it got slices nice portion sizes so much took third one home

very friendly staff and apologetic seems that in the mornings they are always out of the sandwich i want the biggest issue i have though is the lack of speed i can place a mobile order and minutes later walk in and it s still not ready only once in the last month has it actually been waiting for me i m not sure why it s so slow all the time there always seems to be plenty of staff working regardless the staff is super friendly i just wish things could be faster

this starbucks does not rock my world in any way but i have to stop here when i am in tampa because i am always driving by it on my way back to orlando and convenience matters more than quality service is generally fine good but unremarkable the speed of service however costs the location its stars i find that the wait time here is often far too long even when there is not a huge line still where there are no other real options and time is of the essence you will find that you get what you need and sometimes that is enough

my past visits here have been awful i usually get iced coffee or cold brew they are usually out of cold brew but the one time they had it they didn t cut it so i got a venti cup of cold brew concentrate maybe that s why they are always out luckily i was on my way home so i was able to cut it in half at home the iced coffee always tastes burned the good thing is the baristas are friendly the food has tasted good i m going to be visiting panera for my coffee fix from now on

back to being a starbucks gal i was going to dunkin off missouri the evening service is terrible the moral energy here is consistent my only thing is the amount of espresso they give in a single shot is extremely minute not even a full shot but i d rather come here where the service is great

the remodel is awful sterile and not friendly or inviting for hanging out most likely this is by design by someone to drive more traffic through and discourage long stays coffee is still good but the food is pre packaged and meh at best so for over all id rate sb my fav for coffee but they ruined a good thing with the remodel

i am a regular at this starbucks and found all the staff to be very nice and friendly except i had an awful experience with an employee today she was rude and kept interrupting me when i was trying to order and lied to me about not having any blueberry muffins despite there being on display and didn t even bother to check i even called in to check if they had muffins two minutes after i ordered and they did have blueberry muffins i will not be returning to this starbucks again thanks isabel you just lost a customer

ehh this starbucks is ok i came here mid afternoon on a saturday and the place was packed waited in line for at least minutes to order and then another for my drink luckily my drink was prepared well and correctly the service was average nothing to complain about but nothing spectacular the barista making the drinks was disheveled in appearance and had liquid all over the front of his apron granted i get that spills happen but his apron was gross he should have changed to another one if he was going to continue making drinks overall average experience this place seems to have pretty good reviews so perhaps i caught it at a bad time

i wanted to start by saying the hours here on yelp are not correct i m not certain what the hours are but i came through passed by multiple times between am on my way into work and it wasn t open i was able to get breakfast here one morning but that was after am the line moved very quickly but their menu is severely limited i had to settle on my rd breakfast option because they were out of the other i got the feta wrap but it was still frozen cold in the middle which sucked the good thing is my iced chai latte was very good but took awhile to get made would be open to return next time i m in town

the staff is usually quite friendly and they make their drinks well however it is always without fail super dirty every time i come in here the tables have trash and crumbs or spilled drinks on them leaving them sticky today two baristas let drink orders pile up while they were chatting with a friend about his boy troubles pretty unprofessional

stars mostly only for shock value let me preface this by saying that i am not a fan of starbucks i think their coffee is over caffeinated and often burnt their espresso drinks lame at best and everything over priced in fact when i am trying to decide on a cafe to go to starbucks doesn t even make it to the list of options however i must admit that starbucks is extremely convenient they are everywhere and they are open late so when i needed to find a place to study late tonight i decided to go to the green hills starbucks for the first time in maybe years so i walked in tonight with my friend and i couldn t stop my jaw from dropping over and over again and the exclamation wow from coming out of my mouth why because the place has gotten an extreme makeover it s probably to do with the whole new starbucks branding marketing goals but anyway all of the furniture has been replaced with wooden counterparts and comfy couches it has an entirely different feel less commercial and more local and authentic the gigantic study table with electrical outlets has been replaced by benches on the wall bar stools and any other kind of seating you can imagine and the outlets are now impossible to find because they have been painted the same exact brown as the wall which led me to create an extremely awkward situation as i walked around the entire border of the room looking for a plug for my dying laptop despite an inspiring renovation of the entire atmosphere of the place obviously the quality of the drinks has not improved astonished by the new look i inquired the barista about when they redid the place to which she replied last year in february embarrassed i chuckled took my drink and slowly walked away clearly i am behind the times anyway great new feel and atmosphere this one is much more social for starbucks even though the drinks haven t changed so if you must resort to going to starbucks this is the one i would recommend

you ll find this location attached to the hilton bayfront hotel they have an entrance off the street and one inside the hotel also they have shorter hours due to the location as well so be sure they are open before coming this way they do not have a drive thru they have the standard food mugs snacks and beverages of all the locations staff was friendly and the store was clean they do not have a scanner for the phone app so the cashier had to manual input the number and i felt bad for him having to do that they has my drink finished before i was done at the register they also had the florida ornament mug which i picked up here as well no bathroom inside odd location off site parking and no drive thru being this place down a bit overall a great service short hours plenty of seating

the products are always on point but since this is the only starbucks within miles the lines are always long never any available tables you will definitely want to pre order your stuff if you need it fast we need more locations corporate giddy up

i come to starbucks waaaayyyyy more than i should i know this location very well the drive thru is always courteous and prompt but sometimes i like to go in the restroom is always disgusting i know these coffees are costly and i know starbucks can afford a cleaning service to clean their facilities their baristas clearly do not think they get paid enough to keep a clean work environment not only was the restroom disgusting but so was the lobby the floors had massive amounts of trash along with what looked like weeks of yuck built up on the floor i d love to offer my company as some relief please contact stellar cleaning services llc if you need a professional to clean this place up now let me start on the baristas there were some awesome workers about months ago but now they are all young and worried about hanging out and how much fun it would be if they could get another of their friends to work here with them omg please split these people up they do not get the job done well when they are busy talking about the weekend coming instead of listening to the order being placed through drive thru they definitely need a class on how to do your job and do less socializing bottom line starbucks costs too much money to not be taken care of in a top notch manner

as a location this starbucks is difficult to say the least the line for the drive thru is frequently wrapped all the way around the store and maybe two or three cars waiting in line on th street as well this is particularly the case in the morning when their can easily be cars waiting the drive through line also makes it very difficult to park in the lot so you can t app order and pick up easily as well there is overflow parking behind the gas station next to it inside this is an amazingly comfortable coffee shop it is clean wide open and very accessible despite the volume of customers they never seem to run out of what i m looking for customer service has always been great here for me as well starbucks coffee will certainly scratch the itch but it s nothing to write home about it s good but it doesn t blow you away

i love starbucks but this location has the most inconsistent output in terms of taste i don t know if it s just because they are always so busy or what but i have standard drinks i rotate and they never taste the same nor do they taste quite right they do have very friendly staff but be warned the lines are often long and service slow

well i m certainly surprised today usually there is this one barista that is super irritated and has the i don t give a crap attitude and for some reason always doesn t make my beverage right and is usually rude today though today mmph my latt was def good and he seemed less rude almost like he was actually trying to be nice however he still had the unhappy face he usually wears i always hated coming here bc the the guy barista could be really rude at times and it s like i always leave feeling super pissed off but because it s convenient i would come here when i m in the area i hope things continue to get better from here

idk any joy i get from visiting this starbucks diminishes at the annoying light that takes forever wish i could chose a different way out but not so the store is nice and quick an friendly everything i enjoy about the brand its just i don t want to visit because of the hassle to get out of there what this intersection needs is a pretty round about that way everyone keeps moving and doesn t have to wait forever at that damn light maybe i ll go again and try to get out another way ughhh im getting old

this starbucks is a hit or miss sometimes i get the most amazing beverage and sometimes it s way off mark today i asked for an iced caramel macchiato stirred and it tasted like milk with caramel flavor and came unstirred smh i would have asked for them to make me up a new one but i was worried that it would be extremely heavy on the espresso so i just stuck with it plus i was to lazy to ask so my bad i guess but if you pay for designer coffee shouldn t it be perfect
place is always really busy but everyone there is really nice one guy i think his name is grant is super super fun to talk to store manager is super sweet overall everyone is really nice just slow

so this is the starbucks in tampa s f terminal which happens to be a starbucks reserve they have the reserve clover brewed coffee ultimately it was a little disappointing because i mistakenly thought all reserve locations also had the nitro cold brew i didn t snap a picture but it seems like they ve also significantly downsized from their renovation a year ago there wasn t any starbucks specific seating and i felt squished waiting in line for my drink other than that it was on par with any other location

i ordered a traveler for a meeting a traveler is a cardboard box full of delicious whatever you want i get the blonde roast cause that s what those brainy people like i ve worked here at the tgh for years and love that there is a place like this here it s a safe haven for employees and patient family alike stepping into another world for a break from life i called at night to order my traveler it wasn t ordered in the morning so i was late to my meeting made me look bad but i still love this place

the baristas here are outstanding they re friendly and make grabbing coffee here very pleasant and yet the parking is so atrociously awful i often drive to this location see that there is no parking and then head somewhere else for coffee there is no place to wait for a spot and i ve even been double parked into a spot before it s just a disaster

if i were rating this solely based on the amazing individuals that work at this location then believe me you d see the biggest stars possible these employees get hounded daily by huge lines of obnoxious students i ve seen them be berated i ve seen them when they re flustered and i ve seen the way a lot of jerks treat them i absolutely love every employee here and hope that everyone else appreciates them since this location is at the ua and on campus right by the library it gets slammed throughout the day there are times where there are lines that go people out the door and the employees here continue to bust butt to get drink orders out unfortunately the ua has set them up for failure by also having an advanced ordering app not the regular starbucks app they don t do that at this location where while there are people in line there are then college students in classes also ordering drinks so at certain times of the day the in person customers are getting angry because tap and go customers are getting drinks before the in person orders but imagine how hard it is for these few employees to keep up with the people in line and the mobile orders happening at the same time really ua has set them up for failure because people get cranky and take it out on these poor baristas who are doing amazing work unfortunately i have to deduct a star for the long long wait times and for the fact that i think its a horrible business practice to have all of these different ordering systems slamming people but again still stars for the employees they don t let you redeem your stars for a free beverage here that s frustrating you can however still get happy hour deals and other perks here i mainly earn my stars here and then cash them out at regular locations what i really hate about this location is how they nickle and dime you i switch out the milk for soy or coconut in all of my beverages the upcharge for this is fine as i appreciate them offering soy and i realize that costs them a bit more to make i have zero issues with this but what irks me is i used to order drinks with no ice and i d have no issues the ice makes things too cold for me to drink but sometimes i want something that isn t hot either no ice is a great way to get something closer to room temp again i ve ordered like this several times with no issues and i ve never had an issue at any other location ever but suddenly i m told there is a cent upcharge here for no ice they re actually trying to charge you to take ice out of your drink i ve just saved you some water some ice the power it took to make the ice etc and the coffee i m purchasing is around and i usually purchase here x a week x a day that s drinks a week a loyal customer and you really really want to charge someone to take ice out of a drink this new rule comes and goes sometimes they have it other times they don t but basically they need to get over all of their extra charges that don t exist anywhere else seriously this doesn t exist at any other regular or franchise location i ve ever been to at some point you need to realize you re making plenty of money and you don t need to charge to remove ice after all i don t get a discount if i take whipped cream off of my drink employees stars long waits and weird mysterious extra charges stars greed of this location no stars

i had started this review differently and was planning to go on a rant about slow service and how i ve been to other starbucks and blah blah blah this starbucks is big it s clean and the employees are nice they have a drive through which seems silly to me but i know people that like to use it all i know is that when i stop in there it seems like the employees move at glacial pace if you re stopping here plan to slow down a little or a lot depending on how fast you normally go other than that it s pretty nice and well it s close to my office

this been a regular stop on the way to work for me going on years now up front the three stars are for the staff however a couple drag the rest down one with a regularly flippant attitude another common occurrence is at the point of sale when hot food items are ordered the patron s name is not asked and when the order comes a weak callout is made with only the name of the food and consequently not heard in restaurant over the often loud music and sometimes the sound level of the staff having a good time at work i love seeing happy employees so perhaps this is a fair trade off however a half warm breakfast sandwich tastes like hell often they do not have in stock breakfast items like the heated sandwiches who does the ordering and for that matter is there a manager even present seeing to these and the following glaring indiscretions as for the condition of the restaurant i d have to say it s a bit dirty and unattended the window exteriors appear to not have been cleaned since the remodel the window interiors are not far behind the tables don t get wiped on a regular basis through the morning as well as the floor swept and debris remaining throughout the morning it doesn t appear that it s mopped nightly either the supply station is often out of items as i have observed often on my numerous visits at am the condition of the floors as described herein unswept and still showing the signs of the previous business day i did ask about this once and was told oh we got hammered this morning again am and i look around seeing that i was one of three people in the place and but two cars in line outside the staff kids partying it up really as said there is good people working there that take a personal pride in the job they do but all that goes out the door given the aforementioned issues a manager that isn t busy behind the counter preparing orders to oversee that the place is taken care of would be a start a good hard cleaning of the entire restaurant inside and out including the filthy paved areas outside including the furniture is more than overdue i suggest steam cleaning and sterilization can anyone say reset
love starbucks love their coffee but crystal was extremely rude at the cash register today i hope i never come here again if she s working definitely needs to be trained on customer service

minus star for not giving me a paper protector for my cup seriously you hand me a cup in the drive thru over my head with no thingy not sure if it s an idaho thing to save the environment but really drive thru wasn t bad staff was friendly drink was as expected and it is around the corner from the gym i go to in the morning i ll be here more often

it was decent that s about all they seemed to not know how to make an oatmeal or open a new carton of coconut milk my dying son found nothing on the menu appetizing and soon after leaving had to throw up was it the service that made him nauseous the food the terminal disease that s eating away at his organs no one can be sure one thing i can be sure of though is that i ll be visiting this starbucks again because the other option is mcdonald s coffee and that s doodoo pure doo doo

a decent spot to grab a cup of coffee or some food before going through the day this starbucks is part of the university of the sciences and will host a plethora of students it will get crowded and loud during the rush but slow down as people go to class staff are usually friendly depending on the day and service is quick for students this starbucks is similar to regular ones with the perks of being full of your classmates you can use your declining balance or devils dollars here a great spot to get quick tasty breakfast literally the best option for food in general on this campus that doesn t cost you real money for non students this location is nothing compared to a non university affiliated starbucks but you can always get the same options you can at other locations they will take cash and card and treat you no different there are usually many students here who will either be studying or eating so seating can be tricky deffinitely a go to when you visit the school phone wi fi does not work here for some reason there just doesn t seem to be service and nothing ever connects laptops do work here however this is a pretty nice locstion and typical location for a university better food here than most places and a nice atmosphere

if this were your first experience of the starbucks franchise you would walk away neither overly impressed nor depressed for those of us who ve easily been in dozens of them the feeling is about the same in our particular case this week it was a necessary evil we were trying to locate yet another tourist attraction this sounds like complaining but trust me we were having a fabulous time and the iphone and its handy gps were nearly dead so we ducked into starbucks for a drink and a good long battery charge i d never had a starbucks smoothie before and i ll never have one again it was just not like a real smoothie no fruit chunks no bold fruit flavors nothin interesting and a strong preservative taste to seal the deal but chances are i d have said the same thing if i d gone to any other starbucks nationwide so don t take that the wrong way the girls behind the counter were loud and goofy but at least they were having fun at work plenty of parking out front

i m a frequent visitor to many of the locations around my area i usually order the same thing skinny vanilla latte and a breakfast sandwich i went through the the drive up and was greeted by a very friendly barista while i waited she chatted me up and was peppy for the am hour i was pretty tired and her contagious attitude helped pep me up when i got my drink i gave it a sip and tasted awful like burnt coffee i went in and out when i explained it didn t taste right the manager took it right away apologizing and had the other barista make a new one his demeanor was very different and was disgruntled having to make a new one when i got the new one it tasted the exact same i was sorely disappointed that drink went to waste they could have had stars but when you can t make a standard staple drink on your menu that s a problem

definitely not the best location i was thinking with it being so new maybe that s what kept everyone continuously slow and rude i decided to just start going inside due to that being much quicker than the drive thru there are two blonde guys who work there that are amazing and have a great personality but every woman that i ve come across there is just mean hopefully it picks up and their attitudes improve but for now i m sticking to my coffee and tea at home

this starbucks is still just a solid stars they get the job done but without any extra pizzaz in customer service i stopped in to pick up a grande cold brew before my class over at the apple store the cashier was very dry to be honest i do not remember her even thanking me or ordering the wait for my beverage was minimal considering two others were ahead of me in line the young lady who presented me my drink did thank me for coming in so i figured it was her job to say thanks i wish starbucks would go to paper straws or the new lids that are like a travel mug and do away with the plastic straws will i return only if i am taking a class at the apple store when february why liquid refreshment for class

a starbucks like any other starbucks this is the one i visit when i work in the mall and there isn t anything special about it but there s nothing i have found particularly awful either i mostly visit here as oppossed to tim hortons or seond cup because of the my starbucks rewards program the lineups can get pretty ridiculous obviously since it s in a mall they also tend to have only one person on till even when it does get crazy which is a bit annoying especially if you re going there on your break and don t exactly have minutes to spend standing in line to order and again waiting for that order but most of the servers i ve had have been very friendly and good at their jobs there are one or two there that i dread getting but that s the same anywhere my coffee usually tastes just as i expect it to and only once or twice have they gotten anything on my order wrong and they are always happy to fix it a good option if you re in the mall and want a drink or snack though don t hold out hope of them having the new ish bistro boxes in stock they re sold out more often than not

this starbucks has all the good starbucks taste you would expect but the workers are often chatting about who they are going to get fired next making them take longer on your order if you find it funny this might be a good thing otherwise there are better starbucks out there

been here lots of times and they have never got my drink wrong except for today it wasn t exactly what i ordered but pretty close and actually was very drinkable i used to drink starbucks almost everyday but the cost is now prohibitive this is a good location no major issues

i ve only been in here once but the baristas are super friendly and chatty i really appreciate it because a lot of people in the university area seem to hate the students it closes late at midnight and it s got two floors i love starbucks you always know what you re going to get

this starbucks has an awful high turnover rate and training new people tends to slow down the delivery of orders there was once upon a time when this location had a steady crew with the two kims working here they were very friendly consistent in their barista skills and super accommodating when they failed us which was very rare now it s a sure hit or miss and i have to pray to the sweet baby jesus above that these baristas get it right so far it s been pretty good but unlike today they had no product for my pink refresher and the new store in algiers had no splenda i opted for the violet refresher in lieu of pink lol and it doesn t taste bad at all needless to say this is my neighborhood starbucks and we ve forged a good friendship with sandy who s been there a while and i look forward to her making our drinks

i stopped by this starbucks a couple days ago to get my free drink from my rewards upon entering i was greeted with a friendly hello and i was glad to see no line the food selection was the same as any other starbucks and i got my drink after a slightly longer wait that usual i ordered a venti caramel frap with two shots of expresso and extra caramel drizzle the taste was fine but as i was walking to my car the drink ended up turning into a latte there wasn t a lot of ice and i m sure it didn t melt in the cold reno weather overall this place is a solid choice if you want a starbucks drink
place is cute but there s a rude older woman that works here everyone else seemed nice though
its a starbucks they are all about the same but this one seem to have the world smallest parking lot and drive tho people are always trying to get in and out and its just a mess out their

i have been going to this starbucks for years seven i have no complaints regarding my drinks i order a variety of concoctions so it s never the same thing for me they do a good job and even when i have to tell them how to make it they typically do a great job so drink wise they get stars but the slightly more mature gentleman that they have working the window has absolutely horrible customer service skills whenever i great him he never says hello back he just gives me a total for my drink he has never said you re welcome even after being told thank you which i do every time today i asked for my receipt and he said the receipt machine isn t working very curtly while never looking at me i can absolutely understand having an off day we all have them it s not great to have them when you work in the customer service industry especially when you re dealing with hundreds of customers a day but it can happen unfortunately he has made me go out of my way to a different location because of his rudeness i don t know if that s his natural personality and demeanor and he s like that with everyone or if he chooses to be like that only with people that are not of his skin color but whatever the reasoning is his customer service skills need to be addressed i have never had this issue in avon or at the one on th st and lafayette rd it s only him at the th st location i m even considering calling and making a verbal complaint because no one should have to be subjected to that

i really enjoy starbucks i enjoy stopping off at them from time to time to relax and clear my mind although trying to find a parking space at this location is almost impossible sometimes with that is added stress which i don t need what s sad is the location is very convenient for me i ll be craving a cup of jo as i pass look at the lot and decide to keep going

obviously this has all the same offerings as a regular starbucks but because it s in a penn building there are some pros cons pros lots of seats and study space nice outdoor seating options dining dollars from penn meal plans can be used convenient campus location cons not allowed to use mobile app for payment they don t accept any starbucks deals or coupons however they do participate in some campaigns such as frapp happy hour few outlets for laptops despite large study space gets busy full during school year staff can be rude sassy atypical of starbucks you can t even get a glass of water

let s face it it s starbucks a little bit on the overrated side compared to the hip coffee shops that are now dotting the reno area i don t hate their coffee but it s not my favorite however it always seems to be a good choice for meeting up easy to get to lots of parking and plenty of tables and chairs to pass the time idly by no i am not a regular so they don t know me here and the cashier barrista made that very clear by depriving me of any semblance of a smile that the others have written about here but i have to say when i asked if i could have my cappuccino in one of the real cups and not in one of their famous to go cups he indulged me for that i was grateful my friend had one of their italian sodas and when i asked her how it was her reply eh but we had a good chat so all in all it was not a complete fail

super slow but super friendly there were only two cars in front of me and they didn t have a massive order or anything but it still took mins to get my drink that s a bit excessive for a drive thru sure i could have mobile order which i usually do but this location said they were out of what i wanted on mobile app but really they were not out my frap was melted and my tea looked like it was sitting around for awhile i m sure they made the drinks right away when i ordered they just took a long time through the drive thru anyways i m sure i ll be back to this location if i m in the area

i have had a experience at this location tough to find your first time the staff are friendly but sometimes it seems they are a person down drinks are always as expected but slow on occasion the location is convenient and the centrally located
as others have said this starbucks isn t great slow service very unfriendly staff but my drink was good so for a airport stop i guess it ll do

my friend ordered a flat white and it was ok not as well prepared as she s had at other starbucks i had a breakfast sandwich and friend tried it as well and lets say it mostly went in the trash to sum things up the experience at this starbucks could have been better if we were greeted with a smile and some enthusiasm however young lady at counter couldn t do either as much as we were trying to be infectious with ours great customer service can a lot of times compensate for mistakes hope this helps improve things at this location

very small and cramped workers were slow and unfriendly no scanner to pay with your phone she attempted to type in the correct info like times so i could pay wasn t too impressed my drink tastes good though hence the stars i did see a really cool starbucks just up the street though and it is in an awesome and authentic looking building so skip this one and go there

i could never give any more stars to a starbucks their coffee is good and all but i hate the rude hipsters and snobs who flock and take over this particular one has a back entrance away from the beards finger banging their crapple laptops so you can order and then bolt edit karen is hands down the best employee there and deserves a raise everyone else gives sub par service and drinks

well location isnt an issue there everywhere i dont drink coffee so my review is on everything but why is the venti still kinda small i order tead and a few sips and shes empty the prices seem kind of steep but hell everywheres steep staff is always happy to serve you and there baked goods are rather delicious as well i hate line ups and well theres always on here always seriously i dont think i ve ever walked into a starbucks and never had to wait in line meh its a ok

after spin class nine of us went to starbuck s first ever evening hours wine night the weather was perfect we enjoyed sitting outside everyone ordered wine the service was a little slow maybe because this was the first day to serve wine the staff was friendly and helpful a pleasant lady brought our drinks to us and asked if we needed anything else later she came back and cleared our dirty dishes the wine is served in glasses nice and much to our surprise a snack of seasoned pumpkin seeds was included everyone seemed pleased about that the wine was a good quality mine was delicious i heard several comments about how good it was however everyone seemed to agree that the pour was extremely small and for the price seemed a little chintzy starbuck s please reconsider the pour size and make it comparable to the wine quality and the price do that and i will come back with a five star rating we were all excited to know you are now having wine night

let s face it we all kind what starbucks is about you have so many choices and sizes at a premium price i am fine with that their customer service is heralded as top notch i have found the cool refreshers to be a great option to coffee or tea the issue lately with the starbucks locations i have visited is that they do not fill the cup it seems trivial but when you pay top dollar you want your beverage filled not an inch or so from the top next time i will complain but it was just too busy bitching in front of others and backing up the line was not what i wanted let s hope they browse yelp reviews and get it right

bluf i only go to starbucks in a pinch because of morals support your local coffee shops i am not a college age white girl i dont wear yoga pants and i hate furry boots but i was drawn to see what the spiced pumpkin latte was all about i made my gf order it for me though to save me the embarrassment it was okay but nothing special not sure what all the hoopla is about my gf got the salted caramel latte which i didnt think was good at all i like just plain black coffee and any time i stray from that i remember why this line is always long but they are efficient and it goes quick they spelled my name right john so that was a little disappointing

this location is always hit or miss sometimes my order is great and sometimes my order is wrong i counted once and figured out they had messed up my order more than times out of maybe and when i say messed up my order i mean either forgetting something completing giving me the wrong item messing up a drink order or something else it became an ongoing joke anytime i went there the staff was usually helpful when i reported the mistakes but it just shouldn t happen that often to begin with

i ve driven past this starbucks many times and thought it looked like an interesting place i ve never stopped but today i found myself downtown and thought i should stop in and have a look overall i d say it s a pretty nice starbucks but it suffers from one fatal flaw as a work location unless you live nearby and that is the pay parking i didn t spend a lot of time driving around looking for free parking because i don t think it exists in this area an hour it s great if you live or work nearby and have the parking taken care of or are using transit to get here otherwise if you re driving forget it unless have a meeting set up here work for a few hours and it s going to cost you not to mention the inconvenience of having to go plug the meter it s at the bottom of an apartment building so i m sure the residents know this location well busyness there are a lot of apartments around here so i expect this place is pretty busy in the morning i wouldn t mind a starbucks near my house noisiness for being pretty steady it hasn t been too bad for a friday afternoon it s winter now so i don t know what kind of crazy person would order an iced drink to get those blenders going but it is canada ambience this isn t your usual boxy starbucks it clips off the bottom corner of the building so it has an unusual layout the windows seem to line about half of the walls so it s quite bright inside with high ceilings power i didn t really see many outlets at the tables so you may have a problem unless your laptop is miserly with the power free wifi available and works well staff friendly and efficient as usual seating there are seats here with one large table to work at if you re into relaxing in an easy chair there are four of them tucked away in the corner and there s an electrical outlet there perfect place for a power meeting or power nap the rest of the tables are the square type with two chairs each i like them much better than the useless round cafe style tables security it s a nice neighbourhood but if you ve read my other reviews you ll know i m just paranoid about that kind of stuff

this location is always very friendly and accommodating however the last couple of times i ve been and gotten a pink drink it s looked like this sort of hard to see in the photo but it s not mixed well such that the coconut milk is sort of floating in pieces inside the lemonade stuff the first time i thought they were just in a hurry or something but today it was not mixed well again highly recommend the drink but it tastes much better when it s mixed smooth

starbucks as far as drinks go is well starbucks they re always exactly the same i know what to expect and that s what i get so that s the reason for the solid three stars what baffles me about this location is that i have been going there consistently since i moved to this side of town about three years ago and by consistently i mean at least three times a week every single week they still do not know my name every time i go in they act like its the first time they have ever seen me they re never rude but they re not really that nice and even when they re nice they definitely don t recognize me the qt employees next door recognize me more and they have only been seeing me for about months step it up starbucks please

this starbucks is just okay there isn t really anything special about it sometimes they mess up my orders here when i do the online mobile ordering they have added the wrong milk to my coffee and also gave me the wrong food once everytime i order in store my order doesn t come out wrong only when i order on the app there is always a huge line here hence why i do the online ordering sometimes the staff here is in a good mood but other times they aren t you can tell by the way they are talking to the customers if they are or not overall i will continue to come to this starbucks because its convent for me but i hope that their customer service improves and they stop messing up my order

everyone at this starbucks is nice and that is a plus however they are also incredibly slow it takes them way to long to get my very simple order i used to work for a starbucks so i can appreciate how busy they can be i suspect they put all their attention to their drive thru and neglect the cafe i prefer to go to the dunkin donuts next door they are way faster and it is a much better experience

this starbucks is fine i would agree with other reviewers that there isn t a real sense of urgency with the baristas however i ve only been a few times in the late afternoon when i m not in a rush and there isn t a real line not a good place to work lots of teens hang out around gay street and they want their starbucks fix too might be different during working hours i think the non paying customer issue some reviewers were talking about a few years ago doesn t happen as often anymore kind of a shame that a starbucks is in a nice location on gay street vs a local business fenn s coffee is a short walk away and has a homier local vibe without kids and i ve seen people working there
coffee is awesome of course but what i don t get is why they close so early i don t know if it s an arizona thing but usually in ny you can be in the burbs and the coffee joints are hrs
the atomosphere is nice and the music is good for studying it can get loud sometimes when a large group of people come in to study however the internet is terribly terribly slow

in the middle and late s this particular location was a caf paradiso i was more of a tea drinker than a coffee drinker then but every once in awhile i went to caf paradiso for their snacks baked goods and an occasional cup or two of coffee it was a nice place and i liked it a lot then one day when i was working and going to classes at a nearby university caf paradiso was gone it was converted to a starbucks and it s still a starbucks my caf paradiso was gone quel horreur so now it has continued to be a starbucks ever since then and it s not too much different than all the other starbucks locations some have outside seating and others don t have outside seating this one has outside seating the interior must have been remodeled because it s dark like everything is mahogany wood or made to look like that and depressing inside i m not sure what they were trying to accomplish with that but for me it doesn t work it doesn t feel inviting and i didn t want to stay there very long they offer typical starbucks stuff they were limited on the starbucks merchandise like cups and mugs they had food offerings like made up sandwiches and what seemed like limited baked goods parking is a problem now because the formerly free spaces along wydown are not free anymore they have an electronic pay station where you have to pay for the parking now i don t know why they changed it but it is now really inconvenient to park there now those electronic pay stations are a major pain in the ass because they take coins or cards and you have to put in your plate number in addition to paying with either the card or coins i hate them around the corner are the old fashioned parking meters which i prefer over that damn pay station so just beware of that and you will get a ticket if you don t pay i won t be back anytime soon

this is one of the easier locations to get to except during morning hours go after am the drinks still do not come out consistent i came here for days straight and ordered the same green tea frap all tasted different

i am a huge fan of starbucks and i usual come everyday i ve been stopping at this particular starbucks since mid october because my morning commute changed unfortunately i ve been disappointed with this starbucks on many occasions mainly due to inconsistency in the quality and taste of my drinks i always order a latte or a cappuccino lately i ve been drinking more cappuccinos because the lattes i ve been getting here taste so weak being that a cappuccino has less milk i ve been going with that i don t think i should have to order an extra shot just to get a latte that doesn t taste like pure milk the younger girls who work here make better drinks and deliver good customer service there is an older lady who works here who lacks in both categories i feel bad pointing this out but i shouldn t have to feel like a burden when i come here maybe service would be better if we could tip i m not a difficult customer in fact i have great working relationships with all of the baristas in my hometown store in wyomissing i ve never had a single complaint there honestly i don t even care as much about the service as long as i m getting excellent drinks maybe they re neglecting to tend to the espresso machine properly

i would have given them a four but the gal that made our coffee wasn t the friendliest which was a bummer because we came a couple days later and the guy working the drive thru was very happy and polite i guess some people just have there off days i get it

compared to other starbucks this one always has the same issue really dirty gross restrooms i stop here on occasion to work before appointments downtown nothing makes me lose my appetite more for a delicious cup of joe than smelling urine while washing my hands please fix begging you because you have good wifi you are kind of my office starbucks most recent visit was yesterday

while this is the closet starbucks to me i can t actually visit them regularly because of the lack of consistency of the drinks and the staff there are def some employees that are friendly and smile and the others just barely acknowledge your existence the frappes are also sometimes good and sometimes completely watered down depending on the barista i shouldn t have to dread seeing certain baristas and hope they make things properly

this is one of the starbucks that makes you sooooooo glad you can now order from the app the people are normal customer service workers over worked short staffed and under paid in sure as it shows in their work this is not one of the fun hang out happy people starbucks the building is nice the lay out seems backward and causes a lot of congestion and there for some unholy reason is always a line out the door i have never walked out of a star bucks before getting coffee the source of my life but i have here it s just not worth the wait they take forever coffee is coffee but if you go here order from the app it s going to still take a while but it s less than waiting in that line

i had never really gave into the hype of starbucks sb it was just one of those places that everyone seemed to enjoy coffee smoffee what s the fuss right wrong i think i may have become a new convert one early morning i needed to feed the post workout beast within ya girl was hungry without trying i had time to spare before work and wanted to try something different sb seeped into my thoughts and i hopped on over to loughborough commons per one of my favorite youtuber s vlogs she constantly raved about the bacon gouda sandwich so i went with that along with the strawberry acai refresher with coconut milk this particular store is small and sits at the corner to the entrance the drive thru was giving the ladies morning rush hell but they still managed to greet me somewhat dully when i walked in the store was clean and airy on the inside after a few secs of menu gazing to make sure my choices were the one i gave the cashier my order quick simple the wait wasn t too long the workers were going as fast and accurate as possible the cashier didn t ask for my name and i m not apart of their rewards program so they had to yell out my order to me ain t no thing as long as it was accurate lol the strawberry refresher was amazing mixed very well and so fresh i ll definitely be ordering that again the sandwich just ok the applewood bacon was very crispy the egg was cooked to my liking but i just wasn t wow d beautiful looking sandwich tho honestly the sausage egg cheese sandwich from bread co is way better imo in addition my total was pricey sb is pricey in general but nothing over the top being a new convert i m willing to try all of what s offered at starbucks hopefully another trip and experience brings about more stars

i usually love coming in to this starbucks it is one of three near my home but today a gentleman clearly cut the line and i was next to be served and the barista stilled served him this was not cool especially today because i was running late i told the barista and she didn t even apologize

starbucks ahhh classic love a good frapp every once in a while it doesnt happen very often because this location always has a wait early morning i have no time for slow pace between traffic and always running behind this location for me would have me in search of a new job parking is impossible at times i mean they are connected to the bank and also a very busy mall always a drive thru line unless some random hour of the day cake pops a guilty overpriced pleasure i adore do not care much for there breakfast only a fan of the coffee i am a dunkin donut kind of gal so this is stars for me

well i don t know where to start one thing this place is always packed this is my first time having starbucks yeah it s true why you ask well probably because i hate the smell of coffee so if it wasn t for a gift card i would have never tried them like i mentioned its always packed so we walked in the service was perfect i ordered a blueberry muffin and a apple juice it came out nice and warm and was damn good i can honestly see why folks are crazy about this place i m just not into all the coffee and lattes it s just not my thing and for the record i almost died from the coffee smell while waiting for the order lol
